name: microsoft-excel-bi-agent-pack
description: Cross-agent skills, task profiles, references, regression cases, and scripts for Microsoft Excel BI workbooks, VBA, Power Query M, Power Pivot DAX, MDX/CUBE formulas, ADO/SQL automation, deliverable publishing, workbook QA, Office diagnostics, report building, semantic model review, and sanitized fixtures.

interface.shortDescription: Excel BI skills and task profiles for workbook engineering, BI layers, delivery, QA, diagnostics, reports, and fixtures.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin package for agents that need to inspect, modify, debug, validate, publish, and QA Microsoft Excel BI workbooks across VBA, Power Query M, Power Pivot DAX, CUBE/MDX formulas, ADO/SQL data access, Office environment diagnostics, Excel report building, Power BI semantic model review, sanitized fixture workflows, workbook-backed visual QA fixtures, rendered Visual QA evidence through Windows Excel COM PDF export, and real/sanitized regression-case tracking. The package includes workflow skills, concise task-profile entry points, official-documentation routing, deterministic helper scripts for Windows Excel COM plus cross-platform OpenXML inspection, and a safe regression library that captures recurring problem shapes without storing customer workbooks.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Excel workbook, route it to the right Excel BI skill, and give me a risk-ranked edit and validation plan.
Diagnose this VBA, Power Query, DAX, MDX/CUBE, or ADO/SQL issue and separate structural evidence from Windows Excel runtime proof.
Create or audit a client-ready Excel deliverable, preserve the source, and verify formulas, links, queries, Data Model, hidden sheets, and visual QA.
